description: Open redirect vulnerability in the Janrain Capture module 6.x-1.0 and 7.x-1.0 for Drupal, when synchronizing user data, allows remote attackers to redirect users to arbitrary web sites and conduct phishing attacks via a URL in the destination parameter.
